headline: Can Gartner’s AI Strategy Reframe Investor Perceptions After Generation’s Exit From IT?
summary: Generation Investment Management recently sold its stake in Gartner, Inc., citing concerns that artificial intelligence might be eroding demand for Gartner’s advisory services. Ahead of its AI-focused Gartner Finance Symposium/Xpo 2026, Gartner now faces a spotlight on whether its own AI initiatives can offset investor concerns about AI-driven disruption. We’ll now examine how Generation Investment Management’s AI-related demand concerns could reshape Gartner’s investment narrative and...
